fields.cpu_parity: 5/5 basic_v1 prompts full-budget vs the pinned plain-f32 GEMV comparator (the previously recorded translate-de knife-edge was the missing rope_freqs proportional-rope semantics; resolved, no frontier annotations remain)
fields.gpu_parity: 5/5 basic_v1 prompts full-budget on the Metal GPU-resident runtime
fields.distributed_parity: TCP layer-sharding (split 19/42) token-identical to the oracle; fail-closed guards green
fields.api_smoke: non-streaming + SSE chat via CAMELID_GEMMA4_SERVE; typed multimodal rejection; no marker/channel leakage
fields.comparator: llama.cpp 5d56eff --no-repack -fa off -ctk f32 -ctv f32 -ub 1 (plain-f32 GEMV path)
fields.decode_perf: warm CPU decode 75.5ms/step avg (attention 12.2 + ffn 52.9 + output-proj 8.2 + embed 2.2ms) measured at head 45619cf (committed log, clean cache; prior recorded baseline ~6.75 tok/s steady-state — chunked-row GEMV ~1.9x). Today's rerun logs carry a degraded-page-cache caveat: hours of 12.7GB churn against the USB SSD; perf-relevant code unchanged since the clean measurement

claim_boundary: Exact-row text-token generation within the checked basic_v1 prompt pack and API smoke envelope only. No bounded-context promotion, no performance claim beyond the raw logs, no multimodal input (fails closed with a typed error), no neighboring-row or Gemma-family support, no shared-memory claim (distributed mode is layer sharding).
